scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: cd pepper-farm/backend && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONT,BACK -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd pepper-farm/backend && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload
